function.name: browserReadLinkedPage
function.description: Search in the browser or inspect the current page, then either return visible link candidates or open a chosen ref and extract the linked page text.

Query.description: Optional search query. If omitted, the current page is inspected instead.

Ref.description: Optional explicit link ref to open, for example e4 from browserSnapshot.

AutoOpenFirst.description: Whether to automatically open the first visible candidate link when Ref is not provided. Defaults to false.

MaxCandidates.description: Optional maximum number of visible link candidates to return when previewing choices. Defaults to 5.
